name: Tomato Risotto
recipeIngredient: 6 sun-dried tomatoes in oil, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the tomato juice and stock in a large pan over low heat until gently simmering.
2. Heat the olive oil in a separate large pan. Add the onion and garlic; cook for 5 minutes or until softened.
3. Stir in the rice, coating it with the oil. Gradually add hot stock, one ladleful at a time, stirring constantly until each portion is absorbed before adding more.
4. Continue this process until nearly all the stock has been incorporated (about 20 minutes).
5. Add the tomatoes and basil along with any remaining stock. Cook, stirring occasionally, until everything is absorbed and the rice is tender.
6. Season to taste. Serve hot, garnished with fresh basil leaves.
